jurisdiction_name: RIPLEY UNION LEWIS HUNT LOCAL SD (BROWN)
narrative:
Ripley Union Lewis Hunt Local Sd (Brown) school district has 4,164 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
